description: The SQL query is built by interpolating term directly into the statement, allowing attacker-controlled input to alter the query syntax.
suggested_fix: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements and bind term as a value instead of concatenating it into SQL.

description: User-controlled name data is assigned to innerHTML, so HTML or script content in the value can execute in the page.
suggested_fix: Assign untrusted text with textContent or sanitize the value with a trusted HTML sanitizer before inserting it as markup.

description: strcpy copies input into a fixed 32-byte buffer without checking the input length, which can overflow buf.
suggested_fix: Validate the input length before copying or use a bounded copy routine that preserves null termination and rejects oversized input.
